title: Danube
overview: Argentina, 1968. In the midst of the Cold War, the dictatorship of Juan Carlos Onganía (1966-70) organizes the 9th Mar del Plata Film Festival in order to show the world its friendly face, while exercising censorship and repressing dissidence.

trailers.title: Tráiler
trailers.channel_name: Diario La Capital de Mar del Plata
